category_sources: source_facts.description says HTTP server; official GitHub README describes Mighttpd2 as a File/CGI web server on Warp.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses Mighttpd2; source_facts.name is mighttpd2.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links the project home page; homepage contains installation, configuration, and operation documentation sections.
repo_sources: Official homepage says View the Project on GitHub kazu-yamamoto/mighttpd2; GitHub repository README links back to the official home page.
tags_sources: Official homepage lists HTTP server features including CGI, reverse proxy, and URL rewriting; GitHub topics include http, http2, http3, and repository language is Haskell.
